rationale: The definition explicitly contrasts 'a unary predicate symbol' (def:predicate-symbol) with 'an n-ary relation symbol' (def:relation-symbol); the latter was missing. Added.
notes: def:atomic-formula is kept but flagged as tangential: this definition is about what predicate/relation symbols NAME (properties/relations of objects) in a translation key, not about atomic-formula formation. Reviewer may drop def:atomic-formula in favor of the translation-key context.
